kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given The User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When The User Enters Valid Credentials
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And The User Clicks The Login Button
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'And The User Clicks The Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.When The User Clicks The Login Button
kw.status: No keyword with name 'And The User Clicks The Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.When The User Clicks The Login Button

kw.name: Then The User Should See The Success Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'And The User Clicks The Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.When The User Clicks The Login Button
